_comment: The exact llama.cpp build Kayon bundles (RUN-1). Tracked in git on purpose: the binaries themselves are gitignored (88 MB), so this is the only record of WHAT ships, and the only thing CI can act on. Before this existed the bundle was an unidentifiable local build reporting 'version: 1', which meant nobody -- including us -- could say what users were running. Change the tag/sha256 together, then run scripts/fetch-runtime.ps1 and re-check the fit engine's compute-buffer measurements in fit/mod.rs against the new build.
_files_comment: Only what the sidecar needs. The upstream zip carries 52 files (llama-cli, llama-bench, rpc-server, ...); bundling them all would inflate the installer for no gain. NOTE: upstream splits each tool into a launcher stub plus its implementation DLL -- llama-server.exe is only 9 KB and does nothing without llama-server-impl.dll. Omitting the impl DLL stages a runtime that starts and silently fails.
